message:
bd-u785: add CI-friendly summary output and performance thresholds

New CLI flags:
- --summary: prints one-line status for CI logs
  Example: [PASS] 37 cases: 37 matched, 0 mismatch, 0 missing | 330 nodes, 343 edges | 37ms total
- --perf-threshold-ms <MS>: warns if any case exceeds the given pipeline time

These enable integration with CI systems that need machine-parseable output
and performance regression detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
